overall.description: A cinematic cutscene from Hogwarts Legacy showing a student witch receiving her wand from Ollivander in his shop. The scene transitions from dialogue to a magical moment where the wand emits golden sparks and blue energy surrounds the student, confirming the wand has chosen her.

scene_state.functional_zone: Ollivanders wand shop interior with floor-to-ceiling shelving

events.description: Ollivander opens wand box and presents it to the student
student takes wand from box and turns to examine the shelves

agents.ego_description: student witch carefully removing the wand from its box and preparing to test it

notable_agents.action: Ollivander holding the wand box open and observing the student expectantly

entered.detail: dark wooden floor-to-ceiling shelving units filled with wand boxes
small rectangular cardboard boxes stacked neatly on shelves
ornate carved wooden shop counter with curved details
tall leather-bound volumes on middle shelf
small wooden step stool in front of the shelves

segments.scene_description: Inside Ollivanders wand shop, the camera focuses on the interaction between the elderly shopkeeper and the student. The shop is lined with towering wooden shelves packed with wand boxes. Ollivander presents an open wand box to the student, who carefully takes the wand and turns to examine the merchandise.

scene_state.functional_zone: Ollivanders wand shop during magical wand testing

events.description: wand tip emits bright golden sparks and light
blue magical aura and particles surround the student indicating wand compatibility

agents.ego_description: student waving the wand and reacting with surprise as magical effects manifest

notable_agents.action: Ollivander smiling and nodding approvingly from behind the counter

segments.scene_description: The student waves the wand, causing golden sparks to erupt from the tip. The camera holds on her reaction as a blue magical aura envelops her body, signifying the wand has chosen her. Ollivander watches approvingly from the background as the shop's warm lighting mixes with the magical glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement within a dusty wand shop that transforms from a quiet interaction into a vibrant display of magical energy. It begins by focusing on the elderly shopkeeper and a student amidst towering wooden shelves packed with wand boxes, as the student carefully takes a wand from an open box to examine it. As she waves the wand, the atmosphere shifts when golden sparks erupt from the tip, drawing the camera's focus to her reaction. The scene then expands as a brilliant blue magical aura envelops her body, blending the shop's warm ambient lighting with the intense glow of the spell. Finally, the camera holds on this magical confirmation while Ollivander watches approvingly from the background.
